---
title: "Template manifest reference"
description: "Fully annotated .reporoller/template.toml showing every available field."
audience: "platform-engineer"
type: "reference"
---

# Template manifest reference

A fully annotated `.reporoller/template.toml` showing every available field. Fields that are commented out are optional. Remove the `#` to activate them.

For a field-by-field description of each section see [template-config.md](../configuration/template-config.md).

```toml
# .reporoller/template.toml
# Generated by: repo-roller make-template

# ── Template metadata ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[template]
name        = "your-template-name"           # Required. Unique within the org.
description = "What this template provides"  # Shown in web UI and CLI.
# author    = "Platform Team"
# tags      = ["language", "type"]          # Helps with discoverability.

# ── Repository settings ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Overrides global and type defaults. Use sparse tables — only set what differs.

# [repository]
# has_issues    = true
# has_projects  = false
# has_wiki      = false
# has_discussions = false
# security_advisories     = true
# vulnerability_reporting = true
# default_branch          = "main"
# allow_forking           = false

# Force all repositories from this template to be the "service" type:
# [repository.repository_type]
# type_name = "service"
# policy    = "fixed"      # "fixed" | "default" | "allowed"

# ── Pull request settings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# [pull_requests]
# allow_merge_commit    = false
# allow_squash_merge    = true
# allow_rebase_merge    = false
# required_approving_review_count = 2
# require_code_owner_reviews      = true
# dismiss_stale_reviews_on_push   = true
# require_conversation_resolution = true
# allow_auto_merge                = false

# ── Template variables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Variables that users fill in when creating a repository from this template.
# Use {{variable_name}} in file content and file/directory names.

# [variables.service_name]
# description = "Name of the service (e.g. payment-service)"
# required    = true
# example     = "payment-service"
# pattern     = "^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$"   # Optional regex validation
# min_length  = 3
# max_length  = 63

# [variables.service_port]
# description = "Port the service listens on"
# required    = false
# default     = "8080"
# example     = "3000"

# ── Labels ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Labels created on repositories made from this template, in addition to
# labels defined at global and type level.

# [[labels]]
# name        = "template-specific"
# color       = "0075ca"              # 6-char lowercase hex, no '#'
# description = "Issues specific to this template type"

# ── Teams ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Team access granted to repositories from this template.
# May upgrade (but not demote) levels set at global/type level.

# [[teams]]
# slug         = "platform"
# access_level = "maintain"    # none | read | triage | write | maintain | admin

# ── Individual collaborators ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

# [[collaborators]]
# username     = "some-bot"
# access_level = "read"

# ── Repository webhooks ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# GitHub fires these for events inside the repository.

# [[webhooks]]
# name         = "deployment-webhook"
# url          = "https://deploy.example.com/webhook/{{service_name}}"
# content_type = "json"
# secret       = "DEPLOY_WEBHOOK_SECRET"   # Environment variable name
# events       = ["push", "release"]
# active       = true
# insecure_ssl = false

# ── Branch and tag protection rulesets ────────────────────────────────────────

# [[rulesets]]
# name        = "main-protection"
# target      = "branch"             # "branch" | "tag"
# enforcement = "active"             # "active" | "evaluate" | "disabled"
#
# [rulesets.conditions.ref_name]
# include = ["refs/heads/main"]
# exclude = []
#
# [[rulesets.rules]]
# type = "deletion"
#
# [[rulesets.rules]]
# type = "pull_request"
# required_approving_review_count = 2
# require_code_owner_review       = true

# ── File processing ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[templating]
# Files matching these patterns are excluded from repositories created from
# this template. .reporoller/ is always excluded automatically.
exclude_patterns = [
  "README.md",
  ".github/workflows/test-template.yml",
]
# process_extensions = [".toml", ".rs", ".md", ".yml", ".json", ".txt"]
```
